reviews.review_text:
Clean tidy park with good clean amenities.
Camp kitchen currently being built.
Nice ocean view.
Close to main street and shops.
The site is well located and tidy but the communal bathrooms were not cleaned at any point during our stay and overall the bathrooms needed a Deep clean
Hired a cabin for two nights. Very relaxing. A good home base for fishing and a little bit of sight seeing.

Great place to get away, staff were super friendly. Dogs were welcome over Easter long weekend. Powered sites are all gravel with a strip of shade cloth (for caravans etc) so if you're in a tent you may want something for the ground (it wasn't dusty, though).
Probably the best showers I've had in a caravan park.
Great joint, certainly will go back. Great town, great people.
Very very nice people . Fabulous pub in ardrossan . Lovely central pub .

Great location, lovely site and beautiful community.
Staff knowledgeable and willing to assist, very friendly.
Great grassed area with a deck and a new camp kitchen coming soon, great for sitting around for afternoon happy hour!

Very clean and well cared for site.|We were only there for one night but our cabin was clean, quiet and comfortable and had all we needed.|Park is easily accessable from the main road and a stones throw from the town centre.
Just spent 14 days at Ardrossan caravan Park.  It was a great experience,  was sorry to leave. The owners were fantastic and very helpful. Shall return again next year.😃

My Home away from Home

LOVE ARDROSSAN CARAVAN PARK
well located, great service, no frills caravan park. We really enjoyed our stay with the kids.
Leuke camping. Veel residents. Nog geen camp kitchen (gepland).
Fantastic stay, peaceful and absolutely so clean and well maintained. The hosts were amazing and went above and beyond to make sure we were comfortable. Loved our stay in the cabin.

Had a huge powered site. Thoroughly enjoyed my stay and have already booked another. Friendly helpful staff. Very much appreciated.
Thanks so much 🙏

Great Caravan Park. Thank you Sonya and Shane for your
Hospitality. We had a travel voucher for 5 days but stayed longer.  They arranged a band on Sunday which brought everyone together, great night.
We will be back.

Good area. Just visit a friend's staying there.
Looks fantastic. Close to Drake shopping centre and the jetty.
Excellent crabbing area.
Great cabins. Helped us make base to explore the yorke peninsula

Great location. Easy walk into town with everything you might need.
Drive through sites were good but not a lot of room to park your car if you have a large vehicle. Quite dusty if the wind is blowing, which it often is. Apart from this minor annoyance we thoroughly enjoyed our stay.
Friendly, clean and tidy park. Close to everything.

We stayed on a powered site with our camper trailer, which was conveniently close to the amenities for us. The kids enjoyed the playground, pickle ball and giant connect (and so did us adults). Close to shops and the jetty and cliff top playground, it was a pleasure to stay in this quiet, sleepy country coastal town. It was quite windy during our stay, so we didn't put our awning up. A nice spot to explore other beaches from within an hour or 2's drive.

A little gem of a park. Fantastic base camp to see either side of the peninsula. Short walk to ocean / jetty and town. Facilities were spotless. Sites were a good size. Great playground for the kids. We came during school holidays and enjoyed live music and free ice blocks for the kids daily. We also received a little goody bag for kids on arrival. Dog friendly, as were lots of businesses in the area which made travelling with our dog a breeze. Caravan park management were extremely friendly and helpful. Lots of permanent “holiday home” caravans but mainly grouped at other side of park and all tidy and friendly. Town has great new playgrounds, pump track for kids bikes and a fantastic little coffee shop on Main Street. No ‘dodgy’ permanents. Overall a great stay. Would recommend.
Stayed for 3 nights, staff are so lovely , nice park
Had a great time. It’s near the beach and place was very tidy and pleasant. Staff was very friendly and informative. Would recommend to anyone looking to stay.

Big Powered sites, VERY clean and well kept amenities. Nice hot showers. Short walk to town centre and beach with jetty.
Semi-permanent sites have cleaned up & park grounds renewed. Camp kitchen in process of being built.
Lovely friendly staff. Very well maintained park with large powered sites with matting. Easy walk to the shops, cafes and pub. Had a lovely relaxing stay. Great view of the Xmas carol fireworks too!

I loved my stay at Ardrossan Caravan park. The Seaview villas were clean, contemporary and had a great view. My friends and I had such a great time! It was a quick walk into town which was very convenient. The staff were lovely and extremely friendly and helpful! Overall it was a great experience and I would recommend Ardrossan Caravan Park to everyone.
Nice place. Amenities very clean and recently look renovated. Minimal grass. Good sites. Easy access.

My stay at Ardrossan Caravan Park was absolutely amazing. From the moment we arrived, everything was clean, organised, and welcoming. The staff were friendly and genuinely helpful, making us feel comfortable straight away. The facilities were spotless, the sites were spacious and well-kept, and the entire park had such a peaceful, relaxing atmosphere.
We loved how easy it was to settle in and enjoy our time, whether it was taking in the coastal views, exploring the town, or just unwinding at the park. Everything worked perfectly, and you can tell the owners take real pride in keeping the park maintained at such a high standard.
Overall, an amazing experience from start to finish. I couldn’t fault a single thing. Highly recommend Ardrossan Caravan Park to anyone looking for a clean, quiet, and enjoyable getaway. We’ll definitely be back!

We thoroughly enjoyed our second stay at Ardrossan Caravan Park recently, the only down side was, it wasn't long enough! Very friendly staff,  clean, tidy cabin and grounds. Easy walking distance to the main street and great eating places.

We had a lovely time!!

Recently 10 of my friends and I stayed in Ardrossan caravan park. Ardrossan has so much to offer, providing us with relaxation and comfort. The cabins we stayed in were new, clean and spacious. Sonya and Shane, the managers of the park, were accommodating and welcoming. Sonya and Shane provided our group with ideas of activities in the area, allowing us to explore what Adrossan has to offer. Would definitely come back again! Thank you to the caravan park and Ardrossan for such a great trip

Stayed on a powered site for three nights. Second time here. Easy walk into town and easy access to the Walk the Yorke coastal walking trail. Also a good starting point to visit other Yorke Peninsula towns. Good sized gravel sites with a mat. Ours was a drive through. Had to use chocks to level van due to side slope but not an issue. Amenities spotlessly clean. Will certainly stay here again.
I love it here.

We just got here the pub had a great meal and the cabin 17 is amazing high quality and Sonja is amazing
Want a great stay and accomadation
Come and stay here

The park is well maintained with plenty of clean amenities with lovely hot showers. They were in the process of building a new camp kitchen which will help. Unfortunately the dump point is on the other side of the creek - they really need one on the powered site side for caravans and motorhomes.
the park is very nice. quiet location and only a 10 minute work to town and the water. will be going back
We stayed two nights on a powered site. Great location, Amenities perfect. Friendly staff

Great place to stay, playground was just a cross from our cabin children spend a lot of time there.
Cabin was great for our family.
Staff very helpful and friendly.

Lovely Park. Very Clean Hot showers.
Great Location easy to walk everywhere.
Lots to do.Other than fishing
Thank you
Leonie Steve and Family
Victor Harbour/Ardrossan

Lovely caravan park. Great size site.  Facilities, including toilet/shower block and laundry clean and really good.  $5 per wash.  Hanging lines or dryer available.  Free to use iron/ironing board.  Walking distance to bakery, cafes, pub, shops, large Drakes, takeaway,  all 5 mins away. Lots of lovely walks.  Dog welcome.  Great base for exploring the Yorke Peninsular.  Highly recommend .

Went to Ardrossan caravan park a while ago.
To noisey had ferals next to me in their semi permanent site which were very rude and loud.Dogs barking through the night not a good experience.Never going back.
We stay for 3 nights. Lovely friendly staff. The amenities are very clean. Park itself so very tidy and well maintained. Close to town. Easy walk
WE had a group of 10 and all sites were together. The only drawback is that there is no camp kitchen. Hopefully, it is in future planning.

A fantastic Villa, great layout and accomodation - the best I have stayed in in all my travels. Great park managers, Shane and Sonya - very friendly and helpful. New laundry facilities excellent - great option to have machines operated by credit card.

We had a lge site for our van and truck!
Amenities clean and park very clean and tidy

Great location and the amenities were excellent. We had a powered site which was easily accessible. Walking distance to the town centre and jetty. We were privileged to see approx 30 seals playing at the boat ramp.
We had a great stay. Amenities clean. Site no1 was perfect size. Grounds clean and easily accessible for manoeuvring van to site. Greeted by freindly staff on arrival. Thanks.
Location was good, powered site was level and plenty of space. Booked gor one, stayed for two

We stayed in the new accessible cabin. |A beautiful cabin and well equipped, very clean.  |But…:in my opinion it’s not ideal for an able bodied person(s). |The shower is purpose built for a wheelchair. So no screen as such. Water tends to ‘go everywhere’ causing the floor to become very slippery. |Lovely lounge area but if you’re watching telly with a cup of tea….there is nowhere to put your cup or anything for that matter. We had to put our cups on the floor. |The 2nd bedroom, whilst quite roomy, had a bunk bed which was quite comfortable but the ladder was on the wrong end! So….not easy to get in and out of the bed. |Lastly….microwave oven in the kitchen is fine for wheelchair access but very inconveniently located….. very low and way too close to the dining table.
Great location easy walk into town, nice tidy clean park will enjoy this park again
Only thing wrong no cold water in the hand basin and a bit of light shining though at night keep up the good work
Lovely quiet place to stay ... pet friendly, good place to destress
Lovely stay amenities very clean.
Lovely clean spacious cabin, I’ll be back!
Amenities kept lovely & clean.
Excellent park with great facilities and close to everything

We stayed in the Queen Ensuite Cabins and you get what you pay for.
The cabins were neat and clean but there are a few things that could be improved.
Firstly a Bigger TV. Hard to watch if you are in bed. Secondly a bigger area to use for a pantry if you bring your own food.
Thirdly a second bedside light, I had to share mine with hubby. There are two bedside shelves so why not a cheap KMart light on both shelves.
Also need a shelf in the bathroom to store toiletries on besides the window sill.
Lady in the reception was lovely. This cabin would be good with some slight improvements.
We will come back but will book better cabin.
Great place to stay.  Just needs a dump point in main caravan area.
Great owner with Sonya and shane providing awesome live bands the park is well worth a visit.

The best villa we've stayed in
Short walk to the jetty
Awesome  people running the park
We will be back thank you
Stayed in cabin 19 is clean and tidy and loved the bed, very clean and good shower.
Great, time and very friendly people. and great service.
Great location, everything is within walking distance.
The staff were welcoming and egar to please with our questions and requests.

Fantastic little caravan park.  Perfect for a family getaway not far from Adelaide.
Bonus being Pet Friendly too.  Like all pet friendly places Dogs must be on leash at all times.  Or bare minimum restrained within your area.
Park Amenities are a little older but still Good, Clean Condition.  It is a caravan park after all not a 5 star hotel.
The Fish Cleaning Station and BBQs are excellent.  As is the Playgrounds for the children.
Thanks to the management Shane & Sonia.  We will definitely be back again.

If people follow the very simple rules and show common sense.  I’m sure everyone would have a great time.  Maybe next time (Sue) should restrain her dog and her holiday might have been better 😁
We had a mishap at our previous camp spot and the guys at ardrossan caravan park saved our baby’s first Easter and had a spot for us to stay! Fantastic staff and fantastic service, highly recommend 💗
Great caravan park and a shot walk to town.

We enjoyed staying here in a powered site, the sites and amenities were clean, and the crab cooking and BBQ areas were good.

We would have enjoyed a campers kitchen to sit in when the wind was up, and to cook. This would make the place a 6 star!
A great caravan park.  Spacious,  clean and affordable.

Booked a powered site for 3 nights and ended up staying 4!! The loveliest managers you could meet! Caravan park was neat, clean and well maintained. You can borrow crab nets, crab takes, tubs, crab cooking pots...but sadly, there's no guarantee about your catch!! Only suggestion is that the park could do with a camp kitchen on both sides of the creek. Thank you Sonya and Shane for helping make this a memorable stay!
Great caravan park with very friendly staff and terrific amenities that were spotless.  If you are there in the right season they offer you  traps to catch blue swimmer crabs

The park is well maintained, clean and is served very well by lovely staff who provided me (a solo motorcyclist) with an affordable and wind-protected, lusciously grassed, sizeable site from a quick discussion over the phone. Better still, due the rain, the staff were happy to extend me another day at short notice. ||I would recommend any travelling motorcyclist wishing to explore the beautiful Yorke Peninsula use Ardrossan Caravan park as their base where your belongings and luggage are well safe, and dart in out of the many lovely town on the peninsula over a few days. ||I’ll definitely be back.

Great friendly staff greeted me at check in. The facilities were always clean and the park was neat and tidy all throughout out stay. We’ll definitely be returning some time soon and highly recommended this park. 😊 it was great to see as a dog lover people bringing and enjoying a trip away with their loving pets.

First impression was not good, nowhere to sit outside, no deck which is a must have while on holiday, secondly when you have to take shelter from the heat, the tv is so far away from the bed it's almost impossible to see, you need a bigger tv, and no pepper and salt. Having had holiday homes myself these three i've mentioned are a must have, and to be charged what we were it dosen't enthuse us to book with you again.
Lovely neat & tidy caravan park, close to the jetty, pub & shops. Amenities are very clean. Would recommend.
Was a little crowded and pokey to back a large van in position. Sites are in amongst the permanents. Facilities were ok.

Edit review . Back again, this park just keeps on getting better each visit now
2025 🦀❤️
Had the best stay possible.. management were absolutely fantastic,  friendly & helpful went that extra step 👍👍 great caravan park .
Really appreciate the effort put in to the crabbing facilities and on how clean this caravan park is excellent  work
A busy but surprisingly quiet park. Unpowered area on creek bank was perfect for us and we had a lovely stay
Nice place to stay. Close to the jetty, beach and the town center. Well managed by professionals! Worth to visiting!
now has updated facilities and crab cooking area. Close proximity to town and the jetty make this an ideal location. Very friendly staff throughout the park.

We had a great stay at the caravan park. Everyone was very friendly and accommodating. They had  everything we needed to go crabbing and the facilities were great to cook and clean them. The park was clean and very well run Definitely recommend
Great park close to jetty.
We used a powered sight it was a great set up for our caravan
Incredible location. Caravan park very clean, amenities thoroughly maintained. Ill be back.

My partner and I stayed on a powered site at this caravan park over the new year holidays and had a great time! Sonia was absolutely lovely. Extremely friendly and accommodating. Tidy and useful facilities & amenities which we appreciated after a few days off-grid elsewhere. Friendly and warm atmosphere! Highly recommend.
Thanks for having us :)

Modern,Clean and very well maintained. Conveniently located to the town "centre" with a range of takeaway foods and coffee, a Drakes supermarket, Chemist, Bottle Shop and various independent shops selling a range of items, All in All, a great little seaside town
We stayed in a powered site and absolutely loved it. Nice sized sites. Spotless amenities. Crab cooking station and fish cleaning. Very close to the jetty and town. Will definitely be back.

It's a pretty nice spot with a good location. U can walk to the jetty within about 10min or drive in about 2 minutes.

It is a bit cramped for caravan spots and they have some posts planted that make it pretty annoying to park ur caravan. That's really my only complaint, but it is a popular spot, so I guess they're trying to save as much space as possible.

The bathroom is nice and clean and they have good showers. There is also a little playground for kids and a nice crab cooking station.

All in all, it's a nice place to go for a few days away and u can do some nice fishing off the jetty or raking for blue crabs.
Keeping everyone up to date on what is happening in the town
Level gravel sites with generous green matting and ample space to park your tow vehicle. A short walk to Drakes supermarket, main street precinct, pubs, and jetty.
Good clean facilities,  close to everything with helpful and friendly staff with everything you need at the park including crabbing gear, cooking facilities
Loved the cabin. It was beautifully set up with everything we needed. Modern, clean, beautiful view.

However it's not ideal for weekend trips as they only do 3 night bookings making it difficult to get away during the normal working year if you work mon-friday as most people do unfortunate as I would love to come up here more often was extremely windy and had to forfeit one night stay 45 $ otherwise great friendly staff perfect location walking distance to anything you need clean and well maintained facilities
Very helpful and accommodating. The staff were very welcoming and happy to help out!
Friendly and welcoming.! Excellent facilities which are easily accessible, clean and serviced regularly.  The whole park is clean grand has great facilities.  We  will be back !

Caravan site. Well set out park with trees and grass in the right places. Dog friendly. Small but good kids park. BBQs. Well maintained. Lovely outdoor sitting deck with party lights which really enjoyed last night after chook change came through.

Disappointed at being put in a cabin at the back of park with a view of a busy road.
Disturbed by the male manager yelling at a couple in the next cabin trying to unload their second car, not given a chance to explain it would be moved once empty.  Very unprofessional and seemed to be racially motivated, the young dark skin women were quiet and polite the entire time but he kept yelling.  I'm white and did the same thing but nothing was said.  Incredible what they get away with in the country.
Great park, close to town centre walking distance to beach & town. Highly recommend.

Always taken care of there
Thanks guys
Clean caravan park and amenities. Great fish cleaning area. Good bbq area. Easy parking  for caravans. Good sized block. Friendly staff.

Well for some reason in a park with many spaces we and a couple of friends there were given a site backing onto a busy road. To say it was noisy is an understatement. The usual cleaning excuse was given to us to prevent an early check in and I have to say when we did get in the toilets were filthy till we left next morning. No discounts apply at this CP as well. It is close to shops which is the only positive.

We pulled up from Adelaide on our trip from NSW and were looking for a place to hid from the severe weather warning in our rooftop tent. Shane and Sonya were amazing - we walked in and they were able to get us into Site 8 on green grassy unpowered site. 2 minutes from the bathroom/showers which were immaculate and only for $30 for the night! 10/10 would recommend we are so lucky to be here. The Jetty only 10 minute walk up the road.
Great little caravan park. Wr enjoyed our site and had plenty of room. Walking distance to many facilities. Great for fishing or crabbing.

First I would like to apologise to the lady at the desk she was right. We had only seen the page about the annual fees, so I am truly sorry about that.  We had been looking at another caravan parks rules about caravans.|Second, I would also like to thank her for letting us see the caravans in  forgetting our proof of age cards. we don't drive. My husband has epilepsy so we get buses everywhere we go that's on us, so thank you for still letting us look at the caravan park. It's a beautiful, quiet and very friendly place. I believe it would be awesome to stay a week or two there with your family for some time out on school holidays or just some time away from the city to unwind and clear your head.

Great site, can’t thank Sonya and Shane enough for their help. We limped into town with a busted radiator during school holidays, explained our situation and they went out of their way to accommodate us, even when it took over a week to get a new radiator shipped from Melbourne they helped us out.
Amazing hospitality and a really clean site, great amenities and very close to the wharf and town centre

Great location, spotless amenities and friendly staff. The kids had an absolute ball, thank you so much for having us.
Only negative was that smoking was allowed.

First I would like to apologise to the lady at the desk she was right. We had only seen the page about the annual fees, so I am truly sorry about that.  We had been looking at another caravan parks rules about caravans.
Second, I would also like to thank her for letting us see the caravans in  forgetting our proof of age cards. we don't drive. My husband has epilepsy so we get buses everywhere we go that's on us, so thank you for still letting us look at the caravan park. It's a beautiful, quiet and very friendly place. I believe it would be awesome to stay a week or two there with your family for some time out on school holidays or just some time away from the city to unwind and clear your head.
highly recomanded

Great location had a caravan site which whilst large had a bit of a slope, reasonably close to ammenities which were fit for purpose and clean, dump site a fair distance requiring a drive to other side of park all in all nice little park would recommend.

Love it here
Quiet and comfortable
close to Drakes
very well kept park

Thoroughly enjoyed our stay, very helpful staff. Short walk to town and very close to jetty for a quick fish for squid! With success too!
Thank you, we will be back.

We booked the dog cabin and I think they thought just the dog was coming. A very sad tired cabin, not enough bedding, stove doesn’t work, power kept cutting out, when we tried to use toaster, you bang your knee on the fridge getting out of bed. Fridge kept us awake as did heater outside as walls paper thin. How you can charge $140 a nite for this is just mind blowing. Had to exit the park and the re enter on the other side to be with our friends, several times a day!  Also the restrictions on having a fire as adults in winter are ridiculous. Dunny door hits the toilet. Peeling paint, exposed rust, chipped bench top, holes in walls covered with tap?  Also possibly the worst bed I’ve ever slept on.

This is for Katie borg:  I did go to the office with every complaint.  Before we were even given the keys we were encouraged to supply a complaint, for the association, their words not ours, about the standard of the accommodation.  We were cold, uncomfortable and I wouldn’t want someone else to go through what we did.  The cabin was unsafe.  I had a duty.  Your remarks about the pub are bizarre because we had a great time at the pub. Service and food were great. As was bakery as was Chinese takeaway.  And before you lecture me on using social media to complain, perhaps don’t do it yourself re chicken takeaway complaint of yours in google review.

Jacki Rayner.
A shame to complain on a social media platform when the platform  of the front counter of the ardrossan caravan park could have been visited with your list of complaints.
The managers of the park bend over backwards to accommodate there park guests
They are always obliging to help with any issues that arise.
You came to Ardrossan with  a habitual negative approach,which was also witnessed at the hotel where you dined on Saturday night.
Maybe you should done more walks to the other side to see your friends.
This way it would have made you tired,you would have had a good night sleep and it would have saved you waking up on the wrong side and targeting  a hard-working couple  and a beautiful country town

A beautiful, luxuriously appointed cabin looking towards the sea. So many great improvements to this park since we were last here. Congratulations to the managers who have obviously worked tirelessly to make the whole park immaculate. Will definitely come back to stay. May bring our van back next time, great size sites. A camp kitchen would be the only thing the park is missing and would benefit travellers.
Clean

Easy to use powered drive thru caravan sites and lovely helpful owners/managers.
Easy walk to shops and walking tracks to the Ocean.
Would definitely stay again!
Terrible service the staff were incredibly rude my room was falling apart the location is great just stay somewhere else

Warm and welcoming staff.
Everything A1.
We had a lovely long weekend at the Caravan Park with our caravan. Lovely coulple running the place and very good amenities.
Super caravan park fabulous facility very friendly staff and well maintained
Nice cabins  easy walks to pub and lovely coastal walk but if in camper or tent there is no camp kitchen we could find kettle . Microwave  and toaster . And  BBQ. But clean and tidy
Lovely park with great facilities, location close to beach and main street. Cabins are great.
Enjoyed our stay, close to all we needed

Absolutly loved our stay here. We had the perfect location on site 31. Close to amenities and lovely people around us. Great service when booking and checking in and out. Can't wait to come back again. Great Job!

Location is excellent. A 10 minute walk to the Jetty and/or the beach. Facility is well maintained and rooms are clean and staff friendly.

A nice stay for a relaxed and calm holiday.
Very tidy caravan park central to the Main Street including large supermarket and pubs large sites and good amentaties very quiet and relaxed atmosphere we stayed for 2 nights in a Motorhome
Very good site and friendly staff.

Clean amenities serviced regularly |A 2nd dump point on the other side of the park would be an asset |But a  lovely little quiet spot, close to water and a short  walk to shops/pub|Highly recommended a stopover on your journey through the beautiful Yorke 😊
Great location  ...really nice  park great amenities
Great cabins! Beautiful location but I'm a local so a little biased.
Close to town. Good place to travel the area. Very clean amenities.
Great caravan park. Helpful and friendly staff. Good sized sites. Easy walk to supermarket and shopping area. Close to the water and the jetty. Would recommend
Another great park loved our experience there. Very neat clean and tidy
Just stayed at the Ardrossan Caravan Park for the long weekend. Great cabin and service. Do recommend!
Despite the fact that the Adrossan Caravan Park is located seconds away from a breezy coastline, the site itself becomes underwhelming due to unprofessional levels of service.
In cabin. Quick overnight stay. Great.
Cabin was a good size for 2 people, and management  is very friendly.  Location is close to everything . Had a good 6 day stay
Clean & well laid out park. Has a great fish cleaning area with a gas crab cooker. Sites are roomy & the park is close to the town & jetty.
Nice caravan park. Had a cool vibe due to how it was setup over a dried up creek. Had live music on a Saturday night which was really nice. Facilities were good. Dog friendly
Neat & tidy caravan park. Staff very friendly.  Enjoyable stay.
Clean and tidy facilities, easy stroll to the town centre, helpful staff .
Very friendly environment.  Exceptionally vlean amenities. Very clise to beach and town centre. Thoroughly recommend the park for short or long term stay

I stayed here for two nights and the service was amazing. Very kind staff and good rooms.

Clear instructions by staff on how to find my cabin. I enjoyed my stay and can't fault a thing.

Loved staying here with my family on a power site
Heaps of room on every site
Playground for the kids
Local pub is great
Beach and jetty is beautiful
Thank you for having us 😌

What a great little find! After bad weather forced a change in plans we ended up here and so glad we did. Customer service was 10/10. Easy drive through sites. Everything was clean and tidy and the location is amazing. Short walk to everything you need. We also used a cabin 14 that was beautifully updated and spacious with everything you could need. Thank you so much for a great stay. Will definitely be back again!
Amenities OK.  Price good, close to cbd and supermarket
A lovely cabin for a base while we toured the Yorke.
nice and quiet a lot of work done since I was last here
Great place, good customer service. Some green grass would be great.
Hired a uncovered site, good amenities.  Within walking distance of the town center.
Cabin was comfy and accommodating to all our needs. Sheets were lovely and shower too. Kids enjoyed the bunk and also the playground near

Bloody terrific. Great people
And a friendly environment

Stayed here a few times now, on unpowered campsites. They're always nicely kept and are big spaces. Toilets are close by and clean. Staff are always beyond kind and cater to your needs. Late check in is easy, and check out even easier. Within walking distance of everything too. Would recommend

Very short walk to town.
Beautiful views of the sea
More grassy area would be amazing

Great caravan park,  The cabin was clean and tidy, close to jetty and main street , easy parking for 4x4 and boats ,crab cooker not ready for use yet but hopefully will be soon , bbqs were clean and free ,(electric)
Had a fantastic time here with family and good friends, we will be back very soon :)

Enjoyed.  Location very convenient.
Cabin 21 had great view.  Instructions for oven would have been helpful.

What a great Caravan Park, and the hospitality shown to us was superb.
We will definitely be back

Thank you so much
Regards Bryan

Excellent location, quiet and well looked after. The cabins aren’t the newest but they are you typical Jayco cabin and have everything you need. Cabin 5 could do with a new a/c unit as it continually cuts out. The cabins are away from the main part of the park which is nice as you aren’t overcrowded. The park is within a 5 minute walk to the Main Street where you can find the bakery, cafes, pub, pharmacy and supermarket.
Very uncomfortable and very noisy cabin
Nice town and the lady that booked us in was friendly, the room was ok but the bed was awful, the TV didn’t seem to get a lot of the channels (sound only) and the air con could do with a clean.

We found this park to be very enjoyable
We had only planned on staying 4 weeks but due to unforeseen car troubles the owners made another sight available for us to stay as long as needed till we got our car back We even had their help to move our van to the 2nd site
Very friendly park and our 2 small dogs loved it here also x would love to come again x
Great value and location.
Good park. Great central location. Staff were very friendly and helpful. Big van sites on gravel,  no grass. Nice hot shower. Laundry is very dated, and don't waste your money on the clothes dryer 🤣
Very friendly staff, great location
Great place to stay for a couple days..

Stayed here when visiting for family members 90th. Staff were very accommodating, cabin very clean, lots of plates, cutlery, bedding etc. Very highly recommended. Our cabin accommodated for 3 adults 3 children. 1 double bed, 1 bunk bed (top single, bottom double) plus fold out double sofa.
Very clean. Well presented and full amenities. Recommend
